title: Anbe Anbe Ne En Pillai Song Lyrics Uyirodu Uyiraga
stanzas:
Anbe Anbe Ne En Pillai Song Lyrics Uyirodu Uyiraga
#Vidyasagar #Hariharan #KSChitra

anbe anbe
nee en pillai.
dhegam mattum
kaadhal illai.

bhoomiyil naam
vaazhum kaalam dhorum
unmaiyil un jeevan
ennai serum (2)

anbe anbe
nee en pillai.
dhegam mattum
kaadhal illai.

kannaa en koondhalil
soodum pon pookkalum
unnai unnai azhaikka

kanne un kaivalai
meettum sangeethangal
ennai ennai uraikka

kangalaith thirandhu kondu
naan kanavugal kaanugiren
kangalai moodi kondu
naan kaatchigal thedugiren
un pon viral thodugaiyile
naan poovaai maarugiren

bhoomiyil naam
vaazhum kaalam dhorum
unmaiyil en jeevan
unnai serum

anbe anbe
nee en pillai.
dhegam mattum
kaadhal illai.

yaarai pen enbathu
yaarai aan enbathu
ondril ondru adanga

uchiyil thaen vizhunthu
en uyirukkul inikkuthadi
mannagam maranthu vitten
 enai maatrungal pazhaiyapadi

bhoomiyil naam vaazhum
kaalam dhorum
unmaiyil un jeevan
ennai serum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and connection, emphasizing that true love transcends physical existence.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie Uyirodu Uyiraga.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Hariharan and K.S.Chitra.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by Vidyasagar.

When was this song released?

This song was released on November 21, 1998.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Anbe Anbe Ne En Pillai, the singers convey a heartfelt message of love that resonates deeply with listeners. The song plays a pivotal role in Uyirodu Uyiraga, highlighting the emotional bond between the characters. Its soothing melody and romantic lyrics evoke feelings of warmth and affection, making it a perfect choice for weddings and celebrations. The collaboration of Hariharan and K.S.Chitra, under Vidyasagar's masterful composition, creates an unforgettable musical experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Anbe Anbe Ne En Pillai from Uyirodu Uyiraga is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Hariharan and K.S.Chitra, this song is a perfect blend of emotion and melody, crafted by the talented Vidyasagar. Experience the soothing vibes that make this track a timeless classic for romantic occasions.
stanzaMeanings: My dear, my dear, you are my child. There is no love beyond the body.
In this world where we live, the truth is that your life connects with mine.
My dear, my dear, you are my child. There is no love beyond the body.
Oh my dear, the golden flowers that bloom in my heart call out to you.
Oh dear, the melodies that meet your beauty call out to me.
With my eyes open, I see dreams, and with my eyes closed, I search for visions. I transform into a flower at your touch.
In this world where we live, the truth is that my life connects with you.
My dear, my dear, you are my child. There is no love beyond the body.
Without anyone saying anything, without any sound, the fire and gold blend together.
Who is the one to say who is a woman, who is the one to say who is a man? In one, there is no separation.
The honey falls from the sky, and it sweetens my life. I forget my worries and change my old ways.
I breathe in your presence, my life is intertwined with yours.
In this world where we live, the truth is that your life connects with mine.
